content.en:
After Ye Tian's continuous planning, his Blood Huangzi Replicating Body gradually showed his talent, and he also received the attention of the Heavenly Blood Blood.

And after mixing into the Heavenly Blood One Vein, he knew the true strength of the Heavenly Blood One Vein.

The Heavenly Blood Vein has three vein masters and more than seventy demon masters, each of whom is above the Ninefold Dao Realm.

And the entire Supreme Dao Void Demon side has sixty-three veins, all of which are similar to the scale of the Heavenly Blood One Vein, the most powerful of which is the Demon Gu One Vein, but this vein rarely participates in the invasion, and sits in the central area of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Territory, and the other sixty-two veins have to supply the Demon Gu One Vein.

"The strength of the Supreme Dao Void Demon is so terrifying, no wonder the Innate Origin Domain Alliance does not dare to invade the Supreme Dao Void Demon. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Fortunately, Xuehuangzi has a very high status in the Heavenly Blood Lineage, not only is Xuehuangzi's father a Ninefold Dao Void Demon, but there is also a demon lord as an ancestor on it.

Of course, the Supreme Dao Void Demon does not pay attention to the family bloodline, only the bloodline talent, and if the bloodline talent is possessed, it will be valued, if the bloodline is weak, it will be left to fend for itself.

Inside the Dao Void Demon, the weak and the strong are vividly embodied.

this day.

Ye Tian raised the body of the Blood Huangzi to the level of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and after the fourth sequence of the Supreme Dao rules, he continued to refine the bloodline, which also improved the bloodline a lot.

In fact, the bloodline of this body has already reached the top level, but there are some defects, and it requires oneself to comprehend the higher supreme rules and refine the bloodline day and night, so that the power of the bloodline can burst out.

Therefore, after Ye Tian's operation, this replica body became a genius among the Supreme Dao Void Demons, but compared to those Supreme Dao Void Demons with the strongest bloodline, it was still not qualified.

Heavenly Blood Realm.

This is the territory of the Heavenly Blood Vein, and it is also the core place, a world opened up by the Heavenly Blood Vein, which contains countless fortresses and cave heavens, and many Supreme Dao Void Demons live here.

But the Supreme Dao Void Demon who doesn't have a certain status and identity is still not qualified to enter here.

Ye Tian determined that Xu Guang was staying in the Heavenly Blood Realm through the special blood of the Xu clan.

"This is it!"

Ye Tian was sure that Xu Guang was staying inside the huge fortress in front of him, which was the fortress of a demon lord of the Heavenly Blood Lineage.

It was impossible for him to enter that fortress, the Supreme Void Demon guards there would not leave all year round, and he couldn't replace them if he wanted to.

"I can only wait for Xu Guang to come out!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

......

In the years that followed, Ye Tian cultivated silently in the Heavenly Blood Realm, occasionally befriending some powerful Supreme Dao Void Demons, and gradually became familiar here.

Of course, even if the body is copied, it is not without the possibility of exposure, for example, those demon lords use powerful deduction weapons to deduce his identity, then he is easy to expose.

But unless he is suspected, he will be deduced by the demon lords.

Therefore, it is unlikely that he will be exposed.

In the years that followed, he inquired about the information of the Fourth Sequence of Dao Rule items.

As a result, I really inquired.

"Blood Curse Celestial Stone!"

This is a fourth-order Supreme Dao rule treasure on the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and once they found a blood curse celestial stone vein, which even caused a sensation.

But later, they found that the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone was too pitiful, although it could help the Supreme Dao Void Demon comprehend the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rules, but the sequelae were too terrifying.

First of all, it will gradually deplete the bloodline, and the Dao Void Demon relies on the bloodline, and the bloodline is strong, so that it can grow faster, and if the bloodline is exhausted, the combat effectiveness will decline, not to mention, and it will not be able to break through again.

But this is only one of the after-effects, and the bigger one is the power of the curse.

The Blood Curse Heavenly Stone contains the curse power formed by the fourth sequence of supreme rules, even if you comprehend the fourth sequence of supreme rules, there is no way to get rid of this curse power, and after a long time, the physical body will be eroded and destroyed by the power of the curse.

Of course, there is no way to resist the power of the curse, but it is not a symptom of the problem, or the price paid is too great to be worth it.

Therefore, over time, the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone is useless, unless it is some war, and a group of Supreme Dao Void Demons need to be sacrificed, so that they can rely on the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone to comprehend the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rules, and then stabilize the bloodline and maintain peak combat power for a period of time.

But under normal circumstances, this would not be done.

As a result, the Blood Curse Celestial Stone was stored as a strategic material and would hardly be activated.

"The good news is that the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone is not precious in the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and the bad news is that I am not qualified to exchange it for the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone now!"

Ye Tian was a little helpless about this.

Those who are really qualified to use a large number of Blood Curse Heavenly Stones are those Demon Lords, and they have the right to retrieve a bunch of Blood Curse Heavenly Stones from the treasure house.

"You have to shape the character design, so that the blood Huangzi likes to study the bloodline, study all kinds of things, and then make some good things, and then apply to study the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone. Ye Tian felt that only by doing so could he hope to obtain the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone.

So, he did just that.

Moreover, he has a replica body, and he is really able to research something.

In the hundreds of Supreme Dao Epochs that followed, Ye Tian used a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons to conduct experiments and secretly kill them, but he also made some results one after another.

These achievements could not enhance the strength of the Dao Void Demon, but they did have some usefulness and were not low-valued, allowing the Demon Lords of the Heavenly Blood Vein to know the name of the Blood Lord.

After coming to the Heavenly Blood Realm for more than a thousand supreme dao eras, Ye Tian finally went to find the supreme Dao Void Demon Lord behind his vein, the Blood Chen Demon Lord!

The Bloody Demon Lord's Fortress.

Ye Tian came here and said respectfully: "I've seen the ancestor!"

"Blood Huangzi, I heard that you have made a lot of things recently!"

The Blood Demon Lord asked.

Ye Tian nodded: "Ancestor, I have recently researched a little thing, but I am now studying how to extract the origin of the Supreme Dao rule from the Supreme Dao rule items and present it, even if most of the origin is wasted, it will not be affected by the sequelae." Moreover, there is already some effect. "

"You came up with this?"

The Blood Chen Demon Lord was shocked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian flickered again: "But I need better materials, I want to curse the Heavenly Stone with blood!"

"Blood Curse Heavenly Stone, yes, if you really make a little bit of research, then you will be the hero of the Heavenly Blood Blood!" said the Blood Demon Lord excitedly.

He didn't expect that his descendant was fooling him.

In the Supreme Blood Demon Level Forest, how dare the weak fool the higher-ranking ones!

So, he didn't think too much about it.

However, Ye Tian was really just deceiving the Blood Curse Heavenly Stone.
